specific_mechanism: Lichens are obligate symbioses where photobiont algae provide carbohydrates and mycobiont fungi provide water/minerals; bidirectional nutrient flux is regulated by interface membrane permeability that adjusts to environmental stress
llm_application: Multi-agent LLM with bidirectional artifact exchange where one agent generates content (photobiont analog) and the other refines/validates (mycobiont analog); membrane = JSON schema with adaptive field-permission rules that loosen under disagreement and tighten under agreement.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes lichenology feedback-attenuation mapping as proposed.
